prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(register_drawdown_request lender_party_a)
(register_drawdown_request borrower_party_a)
(register_drawdown_request processing_case_1)
(register_drawdown_request processing_case_2)
(allocate_commitment_unit_to_facility lender_party_a commitment_unit_a)
(link_drawdown_request_to_facility lender_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(confirm_drawdown_request_allocation lender_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(assign_approver_to_facility lender_party_a authorised_approver_1)
(evaluate_lender_covenant lender_party_a covenant_rule_1 drawdown_request_1)
(approve_lender_covenant_by_approver lender_party_a covenant_rule_1 authorised_approver_1)
(release_approver_from_facility lender_party_a authorised_approver_1)
(unlink_drawdown_request_from_facility lender_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(allocate_commitment_unit_to_facility borrower_party_a commitment_unit_b)
(link_drawdown_request_to_facility borrower_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(confirm_drawdown_request_allocation borrower_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(assign_approver_to_facility borrower_party_a authorised_approver_1)
(evaluate_borrower_financial_condition borrower_party_a financial_condition_1 drawdown_request_1)
(approve_borrower_financial_condition_by_approver borrower_party_a financial_condition_1 authorised_approver_1)
(release_approver_from_facility borrower_party_a authorised_approver_1)
(unlink_drawdown_request_from_facility borrower_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(assemble_drawdown_package_all_conditions_met lender_party_a borrower_party_a covenant_rule_1 financial_condition_1 drawdown_package_1)
(link_drawdown_request_to_facility lender_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(activate_drawdown_package drawdown_package_1 lender_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(lender_execute_confirmation lender_party_a drawdown_package_1)
(unlink_drawdown_request_from_facility lender_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(borrower_execute_confirmation borrower_party_a drawdown_package_1)
(link_drawdown_request_to_facility lender_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(record_facility_condition_satisfaction lender_party_a condition_evidence_1 drawdown_request_1)
(propagate_condition_satisfaction_to_lender lender_party_a commitment_unit_a condition_evidence_1)
(unlink_drawdown_request_from_facility lender_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(link_drawdown_request_to_facility borrower_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(record_facility_condition_satisfaction borrower_party_a condition_evidence_1 drawdown_request_1)
(propagate_condition_satisfaction_to_borrower borrower_party_a commitment_unit_b condition_evidence_1)
(unlink_drawdown_request_from_facility borrower_party_a drawdown_request_1)
(allocate_commitment_unit_to_facility processing_case_1 commitment_unit_a)
(link_drawdown_request_to_facility processing_case_1 drawdown_request_1)
(confirm_drawdown_request_allocation processing_case_1 drawdown_request_1)
(include_collateral_item_in_package processing_case_1 collateral_item_1 drawdown_package_1)
(initialize_package_on_case processing_case_1 collateral_item_1 drawdown_package_1 drawdown_request_1)
(attach_pricing_component_to_case processing_case_1 pricing_component_1)
(assign_approver_to_facility processing_case_1 authorised_approver_1)
(request_legal_review_without_borrower_documentation processing_case_1 pricing_component_1 authorised_approver_1 collateral_item_1 drawdown_package_1)
(attach_regulatory_confirmation_to_case processing_case_1 regulatory_confirmation_1)
(complete_regulatory_review_no_package_docs processing_case_1 regulatory_confirmation_1 collateral_item_1 drawdown_package_1)
(mark_case_preapproved processing_case_1)
(record_facility_condition_satisfaction processing_case_1 condition_evidence_1 drawdown_request_1)
(propagate_condition_satisfaction_to_case processing_case_1 commitment_unit_a condition_evidence_1)
(unlink_drawdown_request_from_facility processing_case_1 drawdown_request_1)
(detach_pricing_component_from_case processing_case_1 pricing_component_1)
(detach_regulatory_confirmation_from_case processing_case_1 regulatory_confirmation_1)
(release_approver_from_facility processing_case_1 authorised_approver_1)
(allocate_commitment_unit_to_facility processing_case_2 commitment_unit_b)
(link_drawdown_request_to_facility processing_case_2 drawdown_request_1)
(confirm_drawdown_request_allocation processing_case_2 drawdown_request_1)
(include_collateral_item_in_package processing_case_2 collateral_item_2 drawdown_package_1)
(initialize_package_on_case processing_case_2 collateral_item_2 drawdown_package_1 drawdown_request_1)
(attach_pricing_component_to_case processing_case_2 pricing_component_1)
(assign_approver_to_facility processing_case_2 authorised_approver_1)
(request_legal_review_without_borrower_documentation processing_case_2 pricing_component_1 authorised_approver_1 collateral_item_2 drawdown_package_1)
(attach_regulatory_confirmation_to_case processing_case_2 regulatory_confirmation_1)
(complete_regulatory_review_no_package_docs processing_case_2 regulatory_confirmation_1 collateral_item_2 drawdown_package_1)
(mark_case_preapproved processing_case_2)
(record_facility_condition_satisfaction processing_case_2 condition_evidence_1 drawdown_request_1)
(propagate_condition_satisfaction_to_case processing_case_2 commitment_unit_b condition_evidence_1)
(unlink_drawdown_request_from_facility processing_case_2 drawdown_request_1)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem is a planning problem in PDDL for a finance drawdown condition check domain. I need to output only the executable plan as a sequence of ground PDDL actions, one per line, in the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).


## Examining the problem  
- The task involves solving a planning problem in PDDL for a finance drawdown condition check domain.  
- The goal is to output an executable plan as a sequence of ground PDDL actions.  

## Formatting the output  
- Each action must be listed on a new line in the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).  
- The output should only include the executable plan, with no additional explanations.

## Examining the problem  
- The goal is to achieve conditions_precedent_satisfied for entities: lender_party_a, borrower_party_a, processing_case_1, and processing_case_2.  
- Entities include parties (lender, borrower) and cases, each requiring specific conditions and links like entity_commitment_link and entity_has_condition_evidence.  

## Identifying required actions  
- Register drawdown requests for each entity using register_drawdown_request, ensuring no prior registration or satisfied conditions exist.  
- Allocate commitment units via allocate_commitment_unit_to_facility to establish entity_commitment_link for propagation.  

## Exploring preapproval paths  
- Preapproval can be granted through lender_execute_confirmation, borrower_execute_confirmation, or paths like mark_case_preapproved and finalize_case_after_substantive_review.  
- Exceptional approval is available for processing_case_1 via exceptional_approval_1, but processing_case_2 links to unavailable exceptional_approval_2.  

## Considering case processing  
- Cases may involve assembling drawdown packages, legal reviews, pricing, and substantive or exceptional approval to meet conditions.  
- Parties (lender, borrower) require covenant and financial condition links, potentially processed through associated cases to simplify the plan.

## Considering case processing  
- Processing_case_1 can use exceptional_approval_1 for preapproval, requiring entity_processing_enabled and entity_drawdown_link with drawdown_request_1.  
- To enable processing, register drawdown_request for processing_case_1, allocate a commitment unit, link to facility, and confirm allocation.  

## Exploring drawdown request mechanics  
- Registering a drawdown request per credit facility doesn’t consume the drawdown_request object, allowing multiple facility registrations with one drawdown_request.  
- Linking a drawdown_request to a facility requires it to be unallocated, suggesting sequential processing where it can be unlinked and reused for others.  

## Analyzing entity processing  
- Lender_party_a and borrower_party_a, as processing_entities, can use lender_execute_confirmation for preapproval, needing completed checks and an assembled, activated drawdown package.  
- Assembling the drawdown package requires completed checks for both lender and borrower, potentially creating a circular dependency in processing.

## Examining exceptional approval process  
- Exceptional approval for a case requires enabling processing, registering the case, allocating commitment, linking a drawdown request, and confirming allocation.  
- After registration, attach regulatory confirmation and apply exceptional approval, requiring an available approver and finalized steps to set preapproval.  

## Reviewing case preparation steps  
- Attach regulatory confirmation and pricing components to a case, requiring entity processing to be enabled and components to be available.  
- Initialize legal attachments through package initialization or validation, needing case collateral, drawdown links, and proper documentation, with effects like initialization and acknowledgment.  

## Assessing case-specific constraints  
- Case_1 can use exceptional_approval_1 due to its availability and existing links, while case_2 cannot, as exceptional_approval_2 is unavailable with no actions to make it so.  
- Legal review paths may be an alternative for cases like case_2, but further steps are needed to explore this option.

## Investigating commitment unit allocation  
- Only three commitment units are available for four entities (lender_a, borrower_a, case1, case2), creating a bottleneck for processing.  
- Allocating a commitment unit to one entity makes it unavailable for others until freed, which happens after preapproval and recording via propagate.  

## Analyzing preapproval requirements  
- All paths to preapproval, such as lender_execute_confirmation or legal_review_cleared, require entity_processing_enabled, which needs a commitment unit allocated.  
- No actions allow preapproval without first enabling processing, as checks_completed and legal_attachment_initialized both depend on it.  

## Exploring workarounds for limited units  
- Cannot allocate the same commitment unit to multiple facilities simultaneously, as allocate requires the unit to be available and marks it as not available afterward.  
- Propagating to free a unit happens too late, after preapproval, creating a circular dependency since preapproval requires allocation first.

## Sequencing lender and borrower processing  
- Start with lender processing: register drawdown request, allocate commitment unit, and link drawdown request to enable processing.  
- Confirm allocation, assign approver, evaluate and approve lender covenant to complete checks, then optionally release approver and unlink request.  

## Handling borrower steps  
- Repeat lender steps for borrower: register, allocate, link, and confirm drawdown request to enable processing.  
- Evaluate and approve borrower financial condition, release approver, and unlink request to free resources.  

## Assembling the drawdown package  
- Both lender and borrower need checks completed and conditions passed to assemble the drawdown package.  
- Package assembly includes covenant and financial conditions, making it unavailable for further edits.  

## Activating the drawdown package  
- Activating requires the package to be assembled and lender checks completed, with a linked drawdown request.  
- Currently, the lender drawdown request is unlinked, requiring re-linking to proceed.

## Including Collateral and Legal Steps  
- After activating the drawdown package, include collateral items like collateral_item_1, ensuring it's available and part of the package.  
- Initialize legal attachment for the case, confirming collateral is included and no lender documentation is set yet.  

## Attaching Pricing and Regulatory Components  
- Attach a pricing component to the case, marking it as unavailable once added.  
- Add regulatory confirmation, ensuring it's available and linked to the case.  

## Conducting Legal and Regulatory Reviews  
- Request a legal review without borrower documentation, assigning an available approver and engaging the process.  
- Complete regulatory review without package documents, ensuring all conditions are met and marking the review as cleared.  

## Finalizing Preapproval  
- Mark the case as preapproved since legal review is cleared and pricing confirmation isn't obtained yet.  
- Record facility condition satisfaction, linking evidence and marking conditions as recorded for the case.

## Managing Case Transitions  
- Case 2 has a drawdown package linked, and collateral_item_2 is available but not yet included.  
- Initialize the package for case 2, ensuring no lender documentation is present and drawdown is linked.

## Handling Component Detachment  
- Detach pricing component and regulatory confirmation from case 1, making them available for reuse.  
- Release the approver from case 1 if not already done, freeing resources for case 2.

## Processing Case 2 Steps  
- Attach pricing component and regulatory confirmation to case 2, following case 1’s process.  
- Request legal review without borrower documentation for case 2, assign an approver, and complete regulatory review.

## Finalizing Case Approvals  
- Mark case 2 as preapproved after reviews are cleared, similar to case 1.  
- Record facility condition satisfaction for case 2, unlink the drawdown request, and propagate conditions.

## Ensuring Registration Steps  
- Register lender, borrower, and both cases (case 1 and case 2) early, as it sets necessary preconditions.  
- Confirm borrower execution is needed for preapproval, ensuring all conditions are satisfied for recording.

## Linking Borrower to Drawdown  
- Link the drawdown request to the borrower, ensuring it's connected to facility conditions.  
- Record and propagate condition satisfaction for the borrower, then unlink the drawdown request.  

## Allocating Resources for Case 1  
- Allocate a commitment unit to case 1, confirming availability, and link the drawdown request.  
- Confirm drawdown allocation, include collateral in the package, and initialize it for case 1.  

## Managing Case 1 Components  
- Attach pricing and regulatory components to case 1, assigning an approver for legal review.  
- Complete regulatory review without package docs, mark case 1 as preapproved, then detach components.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
